# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      runs-on:
        description: "Runner label (e.g., ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest)"
        required: false
        default: "ubuntu-latest"
        type: string
      ref:
        description: "Git ref to checkout (branch, tag, or SHA). Leave blank for the dispatch ref."
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      setup-commands:
        description: "Optional shell commands to prepare the environment (multiline supported)."
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      build-commands:
        description: "Shell commands to run for the build (multiline supported)."
        required: true
        type: string
      post-commands:
        description: "Optional shell commands to run after build (multiline supported)."
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      shell:
        description: "Shell to use for command steps (bash, pwsh). Note: runner must support it."
        required: false
        default: "bash"
        type: string
      working-directory:
        description: "Working directory for command steps."
        required: false
        default: "."
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  custom-build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runs-on }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ inputs.ref != '' && inputs.ref || github.ref }}

      - name: Setup commands
        if: ${{ inputs.setup-commands != '' }}
        run: ${{ inputs.setup-commands }}

      - name: Build commands
        run: ${{ inputs.build-commands }}

      - name: Post commands
        if: ${{ inputs.post-commands != '' }}
        run: ${{ inputs.post-commands }}
